## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste logs or screenshots here.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22]
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.x]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 124]
